<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":"100%","height":"100%"}'>
    <meta name="description" content="Myop helps teams safely bring AI-generated components from Product, UX and Growth teams into mature products. Builders create experiences while engineering maintains control of the system.">
    <title>About Myop | Building a reality where everyone creates, and nothing breaks.</title>
    <link href="https://framerusercontent.com/modules/lhLZpGGjF11D3HGVmNbJ/fkGaYkJ2YuNFR9uTZkQu/ABCFavoritLight.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <script type="myop/types">
// =============================================================================
// MYOP COMPONENT TYPE DEFINITIONS
// =============================================================================

/**
 * Data structure passed to myop_init_interface(data)
 */
interface MyopInitData {
    teamImages?: string[];
    companyInfo?: {
        name: string;
        tagline: string;
        description: string;
    };
}

/**
 * Actions and payloads for myop_cta_handler(action, payload)
 */
interface MyopCtaPayloads {
    'contact-clicked': void;
    'demo-requested': void;
    'gallery-image-changed': { index: number };
    'link-clicked': { href: string; linkText: string };
    'nav-item-clicked': { item: string };
}

// =============================================================================
// DO NOT EDIT BELOW - Standard Myop type declarations
// =============================================================================

declare function myop_init_interface(): MyopInitData;
declare function myop_init_interface(data: MyopInitData): void;

declare function myop_cta_handler<K extends keyof MyopCtaPayloads>(
    action: K,
    payload: MyopCtaPayloads[K]
): void;
    </script>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 3px solid transparent;
            background-clip: padding-box;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            border: 3px solid transparent;
            background-clip: padding-box;
        }

        * {
            scrollbar-width: thin;
            scrollbar-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) transparent;
        }

        html {
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        body {
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            color: #18181b;
            line-height: 1.5;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f7f6fd 0%, #e0def8 100%);
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            position: relative;
        }

        .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 48px;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        /* ========== CSS VARIABLES ========== */
        :root {
            --purple-5: #F0E8FF;
            --purple-10: #DECCFF;
            --grey-20: #D3D1D5;
            --white: #FFF;
            --panel-bg: #fafafa;
            --bg-color: #ffffff;
            --hover-bg: #f4f4f5;
            --border-color: #e5e5e5;
            --text-color: #18181b;
            --text-secondary: #5A595B;
            --accent-blue: #9A70DF;
            --accent-green: #10b981;
            --accent-red: #ef4444;
        }

        /* ========== NAVIGATION ========== */
        nav {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            z-index: 100;
            padding: 15px 3rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease-in-out;
            height: 64px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        nav.nav-hidden {
            transform: translateY(-100%);
        }

        .nav-left {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 44px;
        }

        .logo {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            margin-left: -10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
            text-decoration: none;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        .logo:active {
            opacity: 0.7;
        }

        .logo svg {
            height: 34px;
            width: auto;
        }

        @media (hover: hover) {
            .logo:hover .logo-icon {
                fill: url(#logo-hover-gradient);
                transition: fill 0.2s ease;
            }
        }

        .nav-links-left {
            display: flex;
            gap: 44px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-links-center {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            display: flex;
            gap: 38px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-links-right {
            display: flex;
            gap: 2rem;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-links {
            display: flex;
            gap: 2rem;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-link {
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 15px;
            transition: color 0.15s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .nav-link svg {
            width: 18px;
            height: 14px;
        }

        @media (hover: hover) {
            .nav-link:hover {
                color: var(--accent-blue);
            }
        }

        /* ========== Nav Dropdown (Rich Panel) ========== */
        .nav-dropdown {
            position: static;
        }

        .nav-dropdown-trigger {
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 15px;
            transition: color 0.15s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 2px;
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 0;
            padding-left: 2px;
            margin-right: -1.5px;
            font-family: inherit;
        }

        @media (hover: hover) {
            .nav-dropdown-trigger:hover {
                color: var(--accent-blue);
            }
        }

        .nav-dropdown-chevron {
            width: 8px;
            height: 6px;
            margin-left: 4.5px;
            margin-top: 3.5px;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease;
        }

        .nav-dropdown.open .nav-dropdown-chevron {
            transform: rotate(180deg);
        }

        .nav-dropdown-panel {
            position: fixed;
            top: 55px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            background: var(--white);
            border: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 16px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08), 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
            padding: 28px 32px 32px;
            display: none;
            z-index: 1000;
        }

        .nav-dropdown.open .nav-dropdown-panel {
            display: block;
        }

        .nav-dropdown-panel.products-panel {
            width: 440px;
        }

        .nav-dropdown-panel.resources-panel {
            width: 420px;
        }

        .dropdown-panel-title {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--text-color);
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }

        .dropdown-panel-divider {
            height: 1px;
            background: #e8e8e8;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 14px;
            padding: 12px 12px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-color);
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-item:hover {
            background: var(--purple-5, #F0E8FF);
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon {
            width: 44px;
            height: 44px;
            min-width: 44px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: transparent;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon svg {
            width: 44px;
            height: 44px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-events"]),
        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-faq"]) {
            width: 39.6px;
            height: 39.6px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-playground"]),
        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-platforms"]),
        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-marketplace"]) {
            width: 37.62px;
            height: 37.62px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-pricing"]) {
            width: 33px;
            height: 33px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 2px;
            min-width: 0;
            padding-top: 4px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-title {
            font-size: 14.5px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--text-color);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-desc {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: #71717a;
            line-height: 1.4;
            font-weight: 300;
        }

        .coming-soon-badge {
            font-size: 10px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--accent-blue);
            background: var(--purple-5);
            padding: 2px 8px;
            border-radius: 99px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            letter-spacing: 0.3px;
        }

        .community-icons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 6px;
            margin-top: 4px;
        }

        .community-icon-link {
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: #f5f5f5;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .community-icon-link:hover {
            background: var(--purple-10);
        }

        .community-icon-link:has(.community-platform-icon):hover {
            background: #f5f5f5;
        }

        .community-icon-link svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
        }

        .community-platform-icon {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            object-fit: contain;
            display: block;
        }

        .nav-cta {
            padding: 8px 16px;
            background: #ffffff;
            border-radius: 6px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 15px;
            border: 1px solid #000000;
            height: 35.5px;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        @media (hover: hover) {
            .nav-cta:hover {
                background: var(--Purple-5, #F0E8FF);
                color: var(--text-color);
            }
        }

        /* ========== Hamburger Menu ========== */
        .hamburger {
            display: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .hamburger svg {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
        }

        /* ========== Mobile Menu ========== */
        .mobile-menu {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background: var(--bg-color);
            transform: translateX(100%);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease, visibility 0.3s ease;
            z-index: 200;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            pointer-events: none;
            visibility: hidden;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }

        .mobile-menu.open {
            transform: translateX(0);
            pointer-events: auto;
            visibility: visible;
        }

        .mobile-menu-header {
            padding: 15px 1.5rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            height: 64px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        .mobile-menu-close {
            cursor: pointer;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .mobile-menu-links {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            padding: 2rem 0;
        }

        .mobile-link {
            padding: 1rem 2rem;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 300;
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .mobile-link:hover {
            background: #F9F6FF;
        }

        .mobile-cta {
            margin: 1rem 2rem;
            padding: 12px 24px;
            background: linear-gradient(234deg, #FFE3D6 3.79%, #EEEBFF 70.67%);
            border-radius: 6px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 15px;
            text-align: center;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        .mobile-cta:hover {
            background: var(--Purple-5, #F0E8FF);
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .mobile-dropdown {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown-trigger {
            padding: 1rem 2rem;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 300;
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            width: 100%;
            text-align: left;
            font-family: inherit;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown-trigger:hover {
            background: #F9F6FF;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown-chevron {
            width: 10px;
            height: 6px;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown.open .mobile-dropdown-chevron {
            transform: rotate(180deg);
        }

        .mobile-dropdown-menu {
            display: none;
            flex-direction: column;
            padding-left: 1rem;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown.open .mobile-dropdown-menu {
            display: flex;
        }

        .mobile-rich-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 12px;
            padding: 12px 1rem;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-color);
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .mobile-rich-item:hover {
            background: var(--purple-5);
        }

        .mobile-rich-icon {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            min-width: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: transparent;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .mobile-rich-icon svg {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
        }

        .mobile-rich-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 2px;
            padding-top: 2px;
        }

        .mobile-rich-title {
            font-size: 15px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--text-color);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .mobile-rich-desc {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: #71717a;
            line-height: 1.35;
            font-weight: 300;
        }

        .mobile-community-icons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 6px;
            margin-top: 4px;
        }

        /* ========== Sign-in Modal ========== */
        .signin-modal-overlay {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.45);
            z-index: 9999;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .signin-modal-overlay.open {
            display: flex;
        }
        .signin-card {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 48px 40px;
            gap: 20px;
            width: 376px;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border-radius: 16px;
            position: relative;
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
        }
        .signin-title-row {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0 0 8px;
            gap: 10px;
            width: 296px;
            align-self: stretch;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .signin-btn-social {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            gap: 8px;
            width: 296px;
            height: 48px;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            align-self: stretch;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 24px;
            color: #0A090A;
            transition: background 0.15s;
        }
        .signin-btn-social:hover { background: #f5f5f5; }
        .signin-google-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .signin-divider {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0;
            gap: 12px;
            width: 296px;
            align-self: stretch;
        }
        .signin-divider-line { flex-grow: 1; height: 0; border-top: 1px solid #B6B5B7; }
        .signin-divider-text { font-weight: 400; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; color: #B6B5B7; }
        .signin-btn-email {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            gap: 8px;
            width: 296px;
            height: 48px;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            align-self: stretch;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 24px;
            color: #0A090A;
            transition: background 0.15s;
        }
        .signin-btn-email:hover { background: #f5f5f5; }
        .signin-terms-text {
            color: #3E3D3E;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 16px;
            letter-spacing: -0.11px;
            text-align: center;
            align-self: stretch;
        }
        .signin-terms-link { color: inherit; text-decoration: underline; }
        .signin-terms-link:hover { color: #6C18FF; text-decoration: underline; }
        .signin-close-btn {
            position: absolute;
            top: 14px;
            right: 14px;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: #999;
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 1;
            padding: 4px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        .signin-close-btn:hover { color: #333; }
        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            .signin-card { width: calc(100vw - 32px); padding: 40px 24px; }
            .signin-title-row, .signin-btn-social, .signin-divider, .signin-btn-email { width: 100%; }
        }

        /* Hero Card Section */
        .hero-section {
            padding: 160px 0 80px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .hero-card {
            background: #faf5ff;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 32px;
            border: 1px solid #DECCFF;
            text-align: left;
            max-width: 720px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            --bg-color: #faf5ff;
            --color2: rgba(243, 232, 255, 0.95);
            --color2-trans: rgba(243, 232, 255, 0.6);
            --color3: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);
            --color3-strong: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
            --color3-mid: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
            --color3-weak: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
        }

        .hero-card-canvas-container {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        #vaporCanvas {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        /* Mesh gradient background */
        .mesh-container {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: var(--bg-color, #faf5ff);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .blob {
            position: absolute;
            border-radius: 50%;
            will-change: transform;
        }

        .blob-1 {
            width: 120%;
            height: 120%;
            left: -40%;
            top: -20%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, var(--color2) 0%, var(--color2-trans) 50%, transparent 70%);
            filter: blur(40px);
            animation: blob1 2s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .blob-2 {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            right: -30%;
            top: -20%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, var(--color3) 0%, var(--color3-mid) 40%, transparent 70%);
            filter: blur(30px);
            animation: blob2 2.67s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .blob-3 {
            width: 130%;
            height: 130%;
            left: 10%;
            bottom: -50%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, var(--color2) 0%, var(--color2-trans) 45%, transparent 70%);
            filter: blur(35px);
            animation: blob3 2.33s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .blob-4 {
            width: 90%;
            height: 90%;
            right: -20%;
            bottom: -10%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, var(--color2) 0%, var(--color2-trans) 50%, transparent 70%);
            filter: blur(30px);
            animation: blob4 1.67s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .blob-5 {
            width: 80%;
            height: 80%;
            left: 20%;
            top: 10%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, var(--color3-strong) 0%, var(--color3-mid) 35%, transparent 60%);
            filter: blur(40px);
            animation: blob5 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .blob-6 {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            left: -35%;
            bottom: 0%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, var(--color2) 0%, var(--color2-trans) 45%, transparent 70%);
            filter: blur(32px);
            animation: blob6 2.33s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .blob-7 {
            width: 70%;
            height: 70%;
            right: 10%;
            top: 30%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, var(--color3-mid) 0%, var(--color3-weak) 40%, transparent 65%);
            filter: blur(25px);
            animation: blob7 3.33s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        @keyframes blob1 {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(0%, 0%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: translate(15%, 20%) scale(1.1) rotate(5deg); }
            50% { transform: translate(25%, 10%) scale(0.95) rotate(-3deg); }
            75% { transform: translate(10%, 25%) scale(1.05) rotate(3deg); }
        }

        @keyframes blob2 {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(0%, 0%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: translate(-20%, 15%) scale(1.08) rotate(-4deg); }
            50% { transform: translate(-10%, 30%) scale(0.92) rotate(5deg); }
            75% { transform: translate(-25%, 5%) scale(1.04) rotate(-2deg); }
        }

        @keyframes blob3 {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(0%, 0%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: translate(-15%, -20%) scale(1.06) rotate(4deg); }
            50% { transform: translate(10%, -15%) scale(0.94) rotate(-5deg); }
            75% { transform: translate(-5%, -25%) scale(1.08) rotate(2deg); }
        }

        @keyframes blob4 {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(0%, 0%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: translate(-20%, -15%) scale(1.12) rotate(-3deg); }
            50% { transform: translate(-30%, -5%) scale(0.9) rotate(4deg); }
            75% { transform: translate(-10%, -20%) scale(1.02) rotate(-4deg); }
        }

        @keyframes blob5 {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(0%, 0%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: translate(20%, -15%) scale(0.95) rotate(6deg); }
            50% { transform: translate(-15%, 20%) scale(1.1) rotate(-4deg); }
            75% { transform: translate(10%, 15%) scale(0.98) rotate(3deg); }
        }

        @keyframes blob6 {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(0%, 0%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: translate(25%, -10%) scale(1.05) rotate(-5deg); }
            50% { transform: translate(15%, -25%) scale(0.92) rotate(3deg); }
            75% { transform: translate(30%, -5%) scale(1.08) rotate(-2deg); }
        }

        @keyframes blob7 {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(0%, 0%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: translate(-25%, 20%) scale(1.07) rotate(4deg); }
            50% { transform: translate(15%, -10%) scale(0.93) rotate(-6deg); }

        /* Calendar animation - scales in */
        .calendar-group {
            transform-origin: 91px 91px;
            animation: calendarIn 7s ease-out 0s infinite;
            opacity: 0;
            transform: scale(0);
        }

        @keyframes calendarIn {
            0%, 100% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            5%, 87% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
            92% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }

        /* Calendar box - appears later */
        .calendar-box {
            transform-origin: 180.4px 116.3px;
            animation: boxAppear 7s ease-out 0s infinite;
            opacity: 0;
            transform: scale(0);
        }

        @keyframes boxAppear {
            0%, 19.3%, 100% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            19.7%, 87% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
            92% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }

        /* Folder animation - scales in */
        .folder-group {
            transform-origin: 465px 436.95px;
            animation: folderIn 7s ease-out 0s infinite;
            opacity: 0;
            transform: scale(0);
        }

        @keyframes folderIn {
            0%, 100% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            8%, 87% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
            92% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }

        /* Folder box - appears later */
        .folder-box {
            transform-origin: 421.6px 355.6px;
            animation: folderBoxAppear 7s ease-out 0s infinite;
            opacity: 0;
            transform: scale(0);
        }

        @keyframes folderBoxAppear {
            0%, 35%, 100% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            38%, 87% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
            92% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }

        /* Gear wheel big - rotates continuously */
        .gear-big {
            transform-origin: 497.8px 364.4px;
            animation: gearBigRotate 7s linear 0s infinite;
            opacity: 0;
            transform: scale(0) translate(1px, -3px);
        }

        @keyframes gearBigRotate {
            0%, 10% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0) translate(1px, -3px);
            }
            15% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1) translate(1px, -3px) rotate(0deg);
            }
            87% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1) translate(1px, -3px) rotate(-300deg);
            }
            92%, 100% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(1) translate(1px, -3px) rotate(-320deg);
            }
        }

        /* Gear wheel small - rotates opposite direction */
        .gear-small {
            transform-origin: 539.4px 398.1px;
            animation: gearSmallRotate 7s linear 0s infinite;
            opacity: 0;
            transform: scale(0) translate(1px, -2px);
        }

        @keyframes gearSmallRotate {
            0%, 12% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0) translate(1px, -2px);
            }
            17% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1) translate(1px, -2px) rotate(0deg);
            }
            87% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1) translate(1px, -2px) rotate(300deg);
            }
            92%, 100% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(1) translate(1px, -2px) rotate(320deg);
            }
        }

        /* Connection line - draws from left to right */
        .connecting-line {
            stroke-dasharray: 370;
            stroke-dashoffset: 370;
            animation: drawLine 7s ease-out 0s infinite;
            opacity: 0;
        }

        @keyframes drawLine {
            0%, 20% {
                stroke-dashoffset: 370;
                opacity: 0;
            }
            21% {
                opacity: 1;
            }
            35%, 87% {
                stroke-dashoffset: 0;
                opacity: 1;
            }
            92%, 100% {
                stroke-dashoffset: 0;
                opacity: 0;
            }
        }

        /* Handshake circle - scales in with bounce */
        .handshake-circle {
            transform-origin: 298px 226px;
            animation: circleAppear 7s cubic-bezier(0.833, 0.833, 0.167, 0.167) 0s infinite;
            opacity: 0;
            transform: scale(0);
        }

        @keyframes circleAppear {
            0%, 40%, 100% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            43%, 87% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
            92% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }

        /* Right hand with rotation */
        .hand-right {
            transform-origin: 298px 226px;
            animation: handRightMove 7s ease-out 0s infinite;
            opacity: 0;
        }

        @keyframes handRightMove {
            0%, 70%, 100% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateX(0) rotate(0deg);
            }
            73% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateX(0) rotate(0deg);
            }
            77% {
                transform: translateX(0) rotate(6deg);
            }
            81%, 87% {
                transform: translateX(0) rotate(0deg);
                opacity: 1;
            }
            92% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateX(0) rotate(0deg);
            }
        }

        /* Left hand with rotation */
        .hand-left {
            transform-origin: 298px 226px;
            animation: handLeftMove 7s ease-out 0s infinite;
            opacity: 0;
        }

        @keyframes handLeftMove {
            0%, 70%, 100% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateX(0) rotate(0deg);
            }
            73% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateX(0) rotate(0deg);
            }
            77% {
                transform: translateX(0) rotate(-11deg);
            }
            81%, 87% {
                transform: translateX(0) rotate(0deg);
                opacity: 1;
            }
            92% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateX(0) rotate(0deg);
            }
        }

        /* Thumb animation */
        .thumb {
            transform-origin: 298px 226px;
            animation: thumbMove 7s ease-out 0s infinite;
            opacity: 0;
        }

        @keyframes thumbMove {
            0%, 70%, 100% {
                opacity: 0;
            }
            73%, 87% {
                opacity: 1;
            }
            92% {
                opacity: 0;
            }
        }

        /* Myop logo animation - appears first, then fades for hands */
        .myop-logo {
            animation: logoAppear 7s ease-out 0s infinite;
            opacity: 0;
        }

        @keyframes logoAppear {
            0%, 44%, 100% {
                opacity: 0;
            }
            47%, 67% {
                opacity: 1;
            }
            70% {
                opacity: 0;
            }
        }

        /* ========== ANIMATED IMAGE GALLERY ========== */
        .image-gallery-section {
            padding: 20px 0 0;
        }

        .image-gallery-wrapper {
            max-width: 450px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 16px;
        }

        .image-stack-container {
            position: relative;
            height: 320px;
            width: 100%;
            perspective: 1000px;
            touch-action: pan-y;
            cursor: grab;
            user-select: none;
        }

        .image-stack-container:active,
        .image-stack-container.dragging {
            cursor: grabbing;
        }

        .gallery-image {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            transform-origin: bottom center;
            transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
            border-radius: 24px;
            overflow: hidden;
            will-change: transform, opacity;
        }

        .gallery-image.dragging-active {
            transition: none;
        }

        .gallery-image.releasing {
            transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }

        .gallery-image.fly-out {
            transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1), opacity 0.35s ease-out;
        }

        .gallery-image.peek {
            transition: transform 0.15s ease-out, opacity 0.15s ease-out;
        }

        .gallery-image img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            object-position: center;
            user-select: none;
            -webkit-user-drag: none;
        }

        .gallery-image.active {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg) translateY(0);
            z-index: 999;
            animation: imageFloat 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }

        .gallery-image.inactive {
            opacity: 0.7;
            transform: scale(0.95);
        }

        @keyframes imageFloat {
            0% { transform: scale(1) translateY(0); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.02) translateY(-60px); }
            100% { transform: scale(1) translateY(0); }
        }

        .gallery-nav {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 12px;
            padding-top: 24px;
        }

        .nav-button {
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #f4f4f5;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .nav-button:hover {
            background: #e4e4e7;
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }

        .nav-button:hover .nav-icon {
            transform: rotate(12deg);
        }

        .nav-button:last-child:hover .nav-icon {
            transform: rotate(-12deg);
        }

        .nav-icon {
            width: 14px;
            height: 14px;
            color: #18181b;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        /* Responsive for gallery */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .image-stack-container {
                height: 320px;
            }

            .image-gallery-wrapper {
                max-width: 100%;
                padding: 0 16px;
            }

            .gallery-nav {
                padding-top: 24px;
                gap: 12px;
            }

            .nav-button {
                width: 24px;
                height: 24px;
            }

            .nav-icon {
                width: 12px;
                height: 12px;
            }
        }

            line-height: 1.6;
            color: #71717a;
            max-width: 600px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 1200px) and (min-width: 791px) {
            .leadership-card {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            }

            .leadership-image {
                min-height: 100%;
            }

            .leadership-image img {
                position: absolute;
                top: 0;
                left: 0;
                width: 100%;
                height: 100%;
                object-fit: cover;
            }

            .leadership-image {
                position: relative;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 1024px) {
            .container {
                padding: 0 32px;
            }

            .gap-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .breakthrough-layout {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .breakthrough-image {
                display: flex;
                justify-content: center;
            }

            .breakthrough-image svg {
                max-width: 400px;
                width: 100%;
                margin-left: 0;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 790px) {
            .leadership-card {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .leadership-image {
                height: 300px;
                order: -1;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 905px) {
            .breakthrough-image svg {
                max-width: 350px;
            }
        }

        /* Responsive - show hamburger on mobile */
        @media (max-width: 905px) {
            nav {
                padding: 15px 1.5rem;
                height: 64px;
            }

            .logo {
                -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
            }

            .logo:active {
                opacity: 0.6;
                background: transparent;
            }

            .nav-links-left,
            .nav-links-center,
            .nav-links-right,
            .nav-links {
                display: none;
            }

            .hamburger {
                display: block;
            }
        }

        @media (min-width: 906px) {
            .mobile-menu {
                display: none;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            html, body {
                overflow-x: hidden;
                max-width: 100vw;
            }

            .section-title {
                font-size: 32px;
            }

            .container {
                padding: 0 24px;
                max-width: 100%;
            }

            .hero-card,
            .vision-card,
            .final-card {
                padding: 40px 32px;
            }

            .team-content {
                padding: 32px 24px;
            }

            .gap-card {
                padding: 24px;
            }

            .breakthrough-image {
                text-align: center;
            }

            .breakthrough-image svg {
                max-width: 300px;
                margin: 0 auto;
            }

            .breakthrough-image img {
                margin: 0 auto;
            }

            .desktop-break {
                display: inline;
            }

            .hero-section {
                padding: 112px 0 60px;
            }

            .leadership-section {
                padding: 0;
            }

            .vision-section,
            .culture-section {
                padding: 60px 0;
            }

            .breakthrough-section {
                padding: 60px 0;
            }

            .final-section {
                padding: 0 0 60px;
            }

            /* CTA Gradient Section Mobile */
            .cta-gradient-section {
                padding: 64px 20px;
            }

            .cta-gradient-section::before {
                width: 100%;
                height: 150px;
            }

            .cta-gradient-section h2 {
                font-size: 32px;
                width: 70%;
                margin-left: auto;
                margin-right: auto;
            }

            /* Mobile Footer Styles */
            .footer-container {
                padding: 20px 20px 40px;
            }

            .footer-content {
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
                gap: 20px;
                margin-bottom: 24px;
                margin-top: 24px;
            }

            .footer-column {
                margin-left: 0;
                margin-bottom: 24px;
            }

            .footer-column:last-child {
                margin-bottom: 0;
            }

            .footer-column h3 {
                font-size: 14px;
                margin-bottom: 16px;
                line-height: 20px;
            }

            .footer-column ul li a {
                font-size: 12px;
                line-height: 20px;
            }

            .footer-column ul li {
                margin-bottom: 12px;
            }

            .footer-bottom p {
                font-size: 11px;
                line-height: 20px;
            }
        }

        /* ========== iOS TOUCH FIX ========== */
        @media (hover: none) {
            .nav-link:hover { color: inherit; }
            .nav-cta:hover { background: #ffffff; color: var(--text-color); }
            .nav-dropdown-trigger:hover { color: inherit; }
            .dropdown-rich-item:hover { background: transparent; }
            .mobile-link:hover { background: transparent; }
            .mobile-cta:hover {
                background: linear-gradient(234deg, #FFE3D6 3.79%, #EEEBFF 70.67%);
                color: var(--text-color);
            }
            .mobile-dropdown-trigger:hover { background: transparent; }
            .mobile-rich-item:hover { background: transparent; }
        }
    </style>
</head>

<script>
    // =============================================================================
    // MYOP PUBLIC API
    // =============================================================================

    (function() {
        // Component state
        let currentData = {
            teamImages: [],
            companyInfo: null
        };

        // Public API: Initialize/update component with data
        window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
            if (!data) return currentData; // Getter mode

            currentData = { ...currentData, ...data };

            // Update team images if provided
            if (data.teamImages && data.teamImages.length > 0) {
                images.length = 0;
                images.push(...data.teamImages);
                active = 0;
                renderImages();
            }

            // Update company info if provided
            if (data.companyInfo) {
                const heroTitle = document.querySelector('.hero-title');
                if (heroTitle && data.companyInfo.tagline) {
                    heroTitle.textContent = data.companyInfo.tagline;
                }
            }

            console.log('[myop_init_interface] Initialized with data:', data);
        };

        // Public API: Handle CTA actions (logs to console instead of alert)
        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
            console.log('[myop_cta_handler] Action:', action_id, 'Payload:', payload);
            // This function will be overridden by host application
        };
    })();

    // ===== Sticky Navigation with Show/Hide on Scroll =====
    (function() {
        const nav = document.getElementById('mainNav');
        let lastScrollTop = 0;
        let scrollThreshold = 5;
        let isNavHidden = false;

        window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
            const scrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

            if (Math.abs(scrollTop - lastScrollTop) < scrollThreshold) return;

            if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
                if (!isNavHidden) {
                    nav.classList.add('nav-hidden');
                    isNavHidden = true;
                }
            } else if (scrollTop < lastScrollTop) {
                if (isNavHidden) {
                    nav.classList.remove('nav-hidden');
                    isNavHidden = false;
                }
            }

            if (scrollTop <= 0) {
                nav.classList.remove('nav-hidden');
                isNavHidden = false;
            }

            lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
        }, { passive: true });
    })();

    // ===== Animated Image Gallery =====
    const images = [
        "https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1766404742173-WhatsApp%20Image%202025-12-17%20at%2010.00.42%20(2).jpeg",
        "https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1766404742173-IMG_0680.jpeg",
        "https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1766483866238-team_photo3.jpg",
        "https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1766404742173-516E15BC-9EBC-4B99-ABD8-5171AA596C8B.jpeg",
        "https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1766483866238-team_photo4.jpg",
        "https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1766483866238-team_photo_6.jpg",
        "https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1766483866238-team_photo_7.jpg",
        "https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1766483866238-team_photo_9.jpg",
        "https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1766483866238-team_photo_10.jpg",
        "./about/WhatsApp Image 2025-11-18 at 11.15.12 (2).jpeg",
        "./about/WhatsApp Image 2025-11-18 at 11.15.13.jpeg"
    ];

    let active = 0;

    function randomRotateY() {
        return Math.floor(Math.random() * 21) - 10;
    }

    function renderImages() {
        const container = document.getElementById('imageStack');
        container.innerHTML = '';

        images.forEach((src, index) => {
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.className = `gallery-image ${index === active ? 'active' : 'inactive'}`;
            div.style.zIndex = index === active ? 999 : images.length + 2 - index;
            div.style.transform = index === active
                ? 'scale(1) rotate(0deg)'
                : `scale(0.95) rotate(${randomRotateY()}deg)`;

            const img = document.createElement('img');
            img.src = src;
            img.alt = `Team photo ${index + 1}`;
            img.draggable = false;

            div.appendChild(img);
            container.appendChild(div);
        });
    }

    let autoSwipeInterval = null;

    window.handleNext = ()=> {
        if (autoSwipeInterval) {
            clearInterval(autoSwipeInterval);
            autoSwipeInterval = null;
        }
        active = (active + 1) % images.length;
        renderImages();
    }

    window.handlePrev = ()=> {
        if (autoSwipeInterval) {
            clearInterval(autoSwipeInterval);
            autoSwipeInterval = null;
        }
        active = (active - 1 + images.length) % images.length;
        renderImages();
    }

    // Initialize
    renderImages();

    // ===== Touch & Mouse Drag Swipe Support =====
    (function() {
        const container = document.getElementById('imageStack');
        let startX = 0;
        let currentX = 0;
        let isDragging = false;
        const swipeThreshold = 50;

        function getNextIndex() {
            return (active + 1) % images.length;
        }

        function getPrevIndex() {
            return (active - 1 + images.length) % images.length;
        }

        function updateDragVisuals(diff) {
            const galleryImages = container.querySelectorAll('.gallery-image');
            const activeImg = galleryImages[active];
            const nextImg = galleryImages[getNextIndex()];
            const prevImg = galleryImages[getPrevIndex()];

            if (activeImg) {
                activeImg.classList.add('dragging-active');
                // Move active image with drag, add slight rotation
                const rotation = diff * 0.05;
                const clampedRotation = Math.max(-15, Math.min(15, rotation));
                activeImg.style.transform = `translateX(${-diff}px) rotate(${clampedRotation}deg)`;
                // Fade out as dragged further
                const opacity = Math.max(0.3, 1 - Math.abs(diff) / 300);
                activeImg.style.opacity = opacity;
            }

            // Show peek of next/prev image
            if (diff > 20 && nextImg) {
                nextImg.classList.add('peek');
                const progress = Math.min(1, (diff - 20) / 100);
                const scale = 0.95 + (0.05 * progress);
                nextImg.style.transform = `scale(${scale}) rotate(0deg)`;
                nextImg.style.opacity = 0.7 + (0.3 * progress);
                nextImg.style.zIndex = 998;
            } else if (diff < -20 && prevImg) {
                prevImg.classList.add('peek');
                const progress = Math.min(1, (Math.abs(diff) - 20) / 100);
                const scale = 0.95 + (0.05 * progress);
                prevImg.style.transform = `scale(${scale}) rotate(0deg)`;
                prevImg.style.opacity = 0.7 + (0.3 * progress);
                prevImg.style.zIndex = 998;
            }
        }

        function resetDragVisuals(animate = false) {
            const galleryImages = container.querySelectorAll('.gallery-image');
            galleryImages.forEach(img => {
                if (animate && img.classList.contains('dragging-active')) {
                    // Add releasing class for smooth animation back
                    img.classList.remove('dragging-active');
                    img.classList.add('releasing');
                    img.style.transform = 'translateX(0) rotate(0deg)';
                    img.style.opacity = '1';

                    // Clean up after animation completes
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        img.classList.remove('releasing');
                        img.style.transform = '';
                        img.style.opacity = '';
                        img.style.zIndex = '';
                    }, 400);
                } else {
                    img.classList.remove('dragging-active', 'peek', 'releasing');
                    img.style.transform = '';
                    img.style.opacity = '';
                    img.style.zIndex = '';
                }
            });
        }

        // Touch events
        container.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {
            startX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;
            currentX = startX;
        }, { passive: true });

        container.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e) {
            currentX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;
            const diff = startX - currentX;
            updateDragVisuals(diff);
        }, { passive: true });

        container.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {
            const endX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;
            const diff = startX - endX;
            const shouldAnimate = Math.abs(diff) <= swipeThreshold;
            resetDragVisuals(shouldAnimate);
            handleSwipe(diff);
        }, { passive: true });

        // Mouse events for drag
        container.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
            isDragging = true;
            startX = e.clientX;
            currentX = startX;
            container.classList.add('dragging');
            e.preventDefault();
        });

        document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
            if (!isDragging) return;
            currentX = e.clientX;
            const diff = startX - currentX;
            updateDragVisuals(diff);
            e.preventDefault();
        });

        document.addEventListener('mouseup', function(e) {
            if (!isDragging) return;
            isDragging = false;
            container.classList.remove('dragging');
            const endX = e.clientX;
            const diff = startX - endX;
            const shouldAnimate = Math.abs(diff) <= swipeThreshold;
            resetDragVisuals(shouldAnimate);
            handleSwipe(diff);
        });

        // Prevent drag on images
        container.addEventListener('dragstart', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
        });

        function handleSwipe(diff) {
            if (Math.abs(diff) > swipeThreshold) {
                const galleryImages = container.querySelectorAll('.gallery-image');
                const activeImg = galleryImages[active];
                const nextIndex = diff > 0 ? getNextIndex() : getPrevIndex();
                const nextImg = galleryImages[nextIndex];

                if (activeImg) {
                    // Send active image to back immediately
                    activeImg.style.zIndex = 1;

                    // Bring next image to front
                    if (nextImg) {
                        nextImg.classList.remove('peek');
                        nextImg.style.zIndex = 999;
                        nextImg.style.transform = 'scale(1) rotate(0deg)';
                        nextImg.style.opacity = '1';
                    }

                    // Animate the current image flying out to the back
                    activeImg.classList.remove('dragging-active');
                    activeImg.classList.add('fly-out');

                    const direction = diff > 0 ? -1 : 1;
                    const flyDistance = 300;
                    activeImg.style.transform = `translateX(${direction * flyDistance}px) rotate(${direction * -15}deg) scale(0.9)`;
                    activeImg.style.opacity = '0.5';

                    // After animation, update to new image
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        if (diff > 0) {
                            active = (active + 1) % images.length;
                        } else {
                            active = (active - 1 + images.length) % images.length;
                        }
                        renderImages();
                    }, 350);
                } else {
                    if (diff > 0) {
                        handleNext();
                    } else {
                        handlePrev();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    })();

    // ===== Auto-swipe when gallery section is 90% visible =====
    (function() {
        const gallerySection = document.querySelector('.image-gallery-section');

        if (!gallerySection) return;

        const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting && entry.intersectionRatio >= 0.9) {
                    // Start auto-swipe if not already running and not stopped by user
                    if (!autoSwipeInterval) {
                        autoSwipeInterval = setInterval(() => {
                            active = (active + 1) % images.length;
                            renderImages();
                        }, 4000);
                    }
                } else {
                    // Stop auto-swipe when less than 90% visible
                    if (autoSwipeInterval) {
                        clearInterval(autoSwipeInterval);
                        autoSwipeInterval = null;
                    }
                }
            });
        }, {
            threshold: [0.9]
        });

        observer.observe(gallerySection);
    })();

    // ===== Vapor Card Effect - Spreading from Top-Left Corner =====
    (function() {
        const config = {
            animation: {
                duration: 2.5
            }
        };

        // State
        let canvas, ctx;
        let particles = [];
        let progress = 0;
        let lastTime = performance.now();
        let animationFrameId = null;
        let globalDpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio * 1.5, 3) || 1;
        let animationComplete = false;
        let maxDistance = 0;

        const ANIMATION_DURATION = config.animation.duration * 1000;

        function init() {
            canvas = document.getElementById('vaporCanvas');
            if (!canvas) return;
            ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

            // Wait for fonts to load
            document.fonts.ready.then(() => {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    resizeCanvas();
                    captureCard();
                    // Start animation
                    animate();
                }, 100);
            });

            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                resizeCanvas();
                captureCard();

                if (animationComplete) {
                    // If animation is done, just redraw the final state immediately
                    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                    ctx.save();
                    ctx.scale(globalDpr, globalDpr);
                    particles.forEach(particle => {
                        const color = particle.color.replace(/[\d.]+\)$/, `${particle.originalAlpha})`);
                        ctx.fillStyle = color;
                        ctx.fillRect(particle.originalX / globalDpr, particle.originalY / globalDpr, 1, 1);
                    });
                    ctx.restore();
                }
            });
        }

        function resizeCanvas() {
            const card = document.getElementById('heroCard');
            if (!card) return;
            const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();

            canvas.style.width = `${rect.width}px`;
            canvas.style.height = `${rect.height}px`;
            canvas.width = Math.floor(rect.width * globalDpr);
            canvas.height = Math.floor(rect.height * globalDpr);

            // Calculate max distance from top-left corner to bottom-right
            maxDistance = Math.sqrt(rect.width * rect.width + rect.height * rect.height);
        }

        function captureCard() {
            const card = document.getElementById('heroCard');
            const heroContent = document.getElementById('heroContent');
            if (!card || !heroContent) return;
            const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();

            // Temporarily show title to capture exact position
            const titleEl = heroContent.querySelector('.hero-title');
            if (!titleEl) return;
            titleEl.style.visibility = 'visible';

            // Create offscreen canvas
            const offscreenCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
            const offscreenCtx = offscreenCanvas.getContext('2d');

            offscreenCanvas.width = Math.floor(cardRect.width * globalDpr);
            offscreenCanvas.height = Math.floor(cardRect.height * globalDpr);
            offscreenCtx.scale(globalDpr, globalDpr);

            // Draw only title
            drawElement(offscreenCtx, titleEl, cardRect);

            // Hide it again
            titleEl.style.visibility = 'hidden';

            // Sample pixels to create particles
            particles = createParticlesFromCanvas(offscreenCtx, offscreenCanvas, cardRect);
        }

        function drawElement(ctx, el, cardRect) {
            const elRect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
            const styles = window.getComputedStyle(el);

            const x = elRect.left - cardRect.left;
            const y = elRect.top - cardRect.top;
            const maxWidth = elRect.width;

            ctx.font = `${styles.fontWeight} ${styles.fontSize} ${styles.fontFamily}`;
            ctx.fillStyle = styles.color;

            const text = el.innerText || el.textContent;
            const lineHeight = parseFloat(styles.lineHeight) || parseFloat(styles.fontSize) * 1.3;
            const fontSize = parseFloat(styles.fontSize);

            // Split by explicit line breaks first
            const paragraphs = text.split('\n');
            let currentY = y + fontSize * 0.85;

            paragraphs.forEach((paragraph) => {
                // Wrap text to fit within maxWidth
                const words = paragraph.split(' ');
                let line = '';

                for (let n = 0; n < words.length; n++) {
                    const testLine = line + words[n] + ' ';
                    const metrics = ctx.measureText(testLine);
                    const testWidth = metrics.width;

                    if (testWidth > maxWidth && n > 0) {
                        ctx.fillText(line.trim(), x, currentY);
                        line = words[n] + ' ';
                        currentY += lineHeight;
                    } else {
                        line = testLine;
                    }
                }
                ctx.fillText(line.trim(), x, currentY);
                currentY += lineHeight;
            });
        }

        function createParticlesFromCanvas(sourceCtx, sourceCanvas, cardRect) {
            const particleList = [];
            const imageData = sourceCtx.getImageData(0, 0, sourceCanvas.width, sourceCanvas.height);
            const data = imageData.data;

            const baseDPR = 3;
            const currentDPR = sourceCanvas.width / cardRect.width;
            const sampleRate = Math.max(1, Math.round(currentDPR / baseDPR));

            for (let y = 0; y < sourceCanvas.height; y += sampleRate) {
                for (let x = 0; x < sourceCanvas.width; x += sampleRate) {
                    const index = (y * sourceCanvas.width + x) * 4;
                    const alpha = data[index + 3];

                    if (alpha > 10) {
                        const originalAlpha = alpha / 255 * (sampleRate / currentDPR);

                        // Calculate distance from top-left corner (in CSS pixels)
                        const pixelX = x / globalDpr;
                        const pixelY = y / globalDpr;
                        const distanceFromCorner = Math.sqrt(pixelX * pixelX + pixelY * pixelY);

                        // Normalize distance (0 to 1)
                        const normalizedDistance = distanceFromCorner / maxDistance;

                        particleList.push({
                            x: x,
                            y: y,
                            originalX: x,
                            originalY: y,
                            color: `rgba(${data[index]}, ${data[index + 1]}, ${data[index + 2]}, ${originalAlpha})`,
                            opacity: 0,
                            originalAlpha: originalAlpha,
                            distanceFromCorner: normalizedDistance,
                            // Random offset for organic materialization
                            offsetX: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 30,
                            offsetY: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 30,
                            // Add slight randomness to distance for organic spread
                            adjustedDistance: normalizedDistance + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.1
                        });
                    }
                }
            }

            return particleList;
        }

        function animate() {
            if (animationComplete) return;

            const currentTime = performance.now();
            const deltaTime = (currentTime - lastTime) / 1000;
            lastTime = currentTime;

            if (!canvas || !ctx || particles.length === 0) {
                animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(animate);
                return;
            }

            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // Progress goes from 0 to ~1.3 to ensure all particles complete
            progress += deltaTime / (ANIMATION_DURATION / 1000);

            let allComplete = true;

            ctx.save();
            ctx.scale(globalDpr, globalDpr);

            particles.forEach(particle => {
                // Calculate when this particle should appear based on distance from corner
                // Particles closer to top-left appear first
                const appearThreshold = particle.adjustedDistance * 0.8;
                const particleProgress = Math.max(0, (progress - appearThreshold) / 0.4);
                const clampedProgress = Math.min(1, particleProgress);

                if (clampedProgress < 1) {
                    allComplete = false;
                }

                // Ease out for smooth appearance
                const easedProgress = easeOutCubic(clampedProgress);

                // Calculate current position (particles drift in from offset)
                const currentX = particle.originalX + particle.offsetX * (1 - easedProgress);
                const currentY = particle.originalY + particle.offsetY * (1 - easedProgress);

                const opacity = easedProgress * particle.originalAlpha;

                if (opacity > 0.01) {
                    const color = particle.color.replace(/[\d.]+\)$/, `${opacity})`);
                    ctx.fillStyle = color;
                    ctx.fillRect(currentX / globalDpr, currentY / globalDpr, 1, 1);
                }
            });

            ctx.restore();

            if (progress >= 1.4 && allComplete) {
                // Animation complete - keep canvas with final rendered state
                animationComplete = true;

                // Draw final state at full opacity and keep it
                ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                ctx.save();
                ctx.scale(globalDpr, globalDpr);
                particles.forEach(particle => {
                    const color = particle.color.replace(/[\d.]+\)$/, `${particle.originalAlpha})`);
                    ctx.fillStyle = color;
                    ctx.fillRect(particle.originalX / globalDpr, particle.originalY / globalDpr, 1, 1);
                });
                ctx.restore();
                return;
            }

            animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }

        function easeOutCubic(x) {
            return 1 - Math.pow(1 - x, 3);
        }

        function debounce(func, wait) {
            let timeout;
            return function executedFunction(...args) {
                clearTimeout(timeout);
                timeout = setTimeout(() => func.apply(this, args), wait);
            };
        }

        // Initialize when DOM is ready
        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
        } else {
            init();
        }
    })();

    // ===== Navigation Dropdowns (Products & Resources) =====
    (function() {
        document.getElementById('productsDropdown').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            if (e.target.closest('.dropdown-rich-item') || e.target.closest('.community-icon-link')) return;
            e.stopPropagation();
            this.classList.toggle('open');
            document.getElementById('resourcesDropdown').classList.remove('open');
        });
        document.getElementById('resourcesDropdown').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            if (e.target.closest('.dropdown-rich-item') || e.target.closest('.community-icon-link')) return;
            e.stopPropagation();
            this.classList.toggle('open');
            document.getElementById('productsDropdown').classList.remove('open');
        });
        document.getElementById('mobileProductsDropdown').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            if (e.target.closest('.mobile-rich-item')) return;
            e.stopPropagation();
            this.classList.toggle('open');
            document.getElementById('mobileResourcesDropdown').classList.remove('open');
        });
        document.getElementById('mobileResourcesDropdown').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            if (e.target.closest('.mobile-rich-item') || e.target.closest('.community-icon-link')) return;
            e.stopPropagation();
            this.classList.toggle('open');
            document.getElementById('mobileProductsDropdown').classList.remove('open');
        });
        document.addEventListener('click', function() {
            document.getElementById('productsDropdown').classList.remove('open');
            document.getElementById('resourcesDropdown').classList.remove('open');
            document.getElementById('mobileProductsDropdown').classList.remove('open');
            document.getElementById('mobileResourcesDropdown').classList.remove('open');
        });

        // Position dropdown panels just below nav
        document.querySelectorAll('.nav-dropdown-panel').forEach(function(panel) {
            panel.style.setProperty('top', '55px', 'important');
        });
    })();

    // ===== CTA Handler Integration =====
    // Attach CTA handlers to navigation links
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link, .mobile-link, .nav-dropdown-item, .mobile-dropdown-item').forEach(link => {
        link.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            const href = this.getAttribute('href') || '';
            const linkText = this.textContent.trim();
            window.myop_cta_handler('link-clicked', { href, linkText });
        });
    });

    // CTA buttons
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-cta, .mobile-cta').forEach(btn => {
        btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            window.myop_cta_handler('demo-requested', {});
        });
    });
</script>
